title: Slim Carter
writer: Montgomery Pittman, David Bramson, Mary C. McCall Jr.
actors: Jock Mahoney, Julie Adams, Tim Hovey
plot: Hughie Mack, a not so nice western singer, is discovered by Clover Doyle as the next movie cowboy hero. His name is changed to Slim Carter and a promotional buildup begins. Leo Gallaher, an orphan boy wins the contest to spend a m...
